title: senecio flaccidifolius
intro: Senecio flaccidifolius, also known as the flaccid-leaved ragwort, is a perennial plant belonging to the daisy family, Asteraceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to act as a purgative and to stimulate the digestive system. The health benefits of Senecio flaccidifolius include its potential to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its use as a diuretic. Senecio flaccidifolius is often prepared as a tea or infusion, and in some cases, its roots and leaves are used to make a tincture for medicinal purposes.
